start.text: Oh! Hello there! I didn't see you coming. *smiles warmly*

intro_1.text: I'm Sakura! I love cherry blossoms and nature. What brings you to this beautiful park today?

choices.text: I'm just enjoying the scenery. It's beautiful here.
I was looking for someone to talk to.

response_scenery.text: Right?! The cherry blossoms are in full bloom today! *eyes sparkling with joy* I could stay here forever...

response_talk.text: Really? I'm glad you found me then! I love meeting new people. *beaming smile*

response_often.text: Almost every day! There's something magical about this place. The trees seem to whisper secrets when the wind blows...

common_ending.text: Hey, would you like to come back tomorrow? I can show you my favorite spot where the petals fall like snow!

choices.text: I'd love to! See you tomorrow, Sakura.

ending_yes.text: Yay! *claps hands excitedly* It's a date then! I can't wait! See you tomorrow! *waves goodbye with a big smile*

ending_maybe.text: Oh... okay. *slightly disappointed but still smiling* Well, you know where to find me! Take care!
